title: Chatbot-powered Career Coach
scenario: Create a prompt that will generate a high-quality, personalized, and engaging persona-based chatbot dialogue for a career coach. The target output should be a text-based dialogue that incorporates career expertise, emotional intelligence, and audience interaction. The coach should be able to provide guidance on career development, answer user queries, and provide personalized recommendations based on user goals and interests. The dialogue should be 5-7 lines long, use a warm and engaging tone, and include a clear call-to-action for users to request personalized coaching.
constraints: Must include a minimum of 2 user queries and responses

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the dialogue adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the tone of the dialogue warm, engaging, and informative?
Is the dialogue high-quality, informative, and entertaining?
Does the dialogue demonstrate effective career coaching skills, including providing guidance on career development and personalized recommendations?
